name: hydra
title: hydra
description:
very fast network logon cracker
Hydra is a parallelized login cracker which supports numerous protocols
to attack. It is very fast and flexible, and new modules are easy to add.
.
This tool makes it possible for researchers and security consultants to
show how easy it would be to gain unauthorized access to a system
remotely.
.
It supports: Cisco AAA, Cisco auth, Cisco enable, CVS, FTP, HTTP(S)-FORM-GET,
HTTP(S)-FORM-POST, HTTP(S)-GET, HTTP(S)-HEAD, HTTP-Proxy, ICQ, IMAP, IRC,
LDAP, MS-SQL, MySQL, NNTP, Oracle Listener, Oracle SID, PC-Anywhere, PC-NFS,
POP3, PostgreSQL, RDP, Rexec, Rlogin, Rsh, SIP, SMB(NT), SMTP, SMTP Enum,
SNMP v1+v2+v3, SOCKS5, SSH (v1 and v2), SSHKEY, Subversion, Teamspeak (TS2),
Telnet, VMware-Auth, VNC and XMPP.

commands.name: dpl4hydra
commands.description: Generates a (d)efault (p)assword (l)ist as input for THC hydra

commands.name: hydra
commands.description: a very fast network logon cracker which supports many different services

commands.name: hydra-wizard
commands.description: Wizard to use hydra from command line

commands.name: pw-inspector
commands.description: A tool to reduce the password list

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use dpl4hydra because very fast network logon cracker.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use dpl4hydra as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `dpl4hydra linksys` as documented upstream for dpl4hydra.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `hydra -C ~/.dpl4hydra/dpl4hydra_linksys.lst -t 1 $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST http-get /index.asp` as documented upstream for dpl4hydra.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair dpl4hydra with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `dpl4hydra --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.readme: DPL4HYDRA - Generates a (d)efault (p)assword (l)ist as input for THC hydra
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install hydra. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `hydra -C ~/.dpl4hydra/dpl4hydra_linksys.lst -t 1 $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST http-get /index.asp`.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: very fast network logon cracker.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: DPL4HYDRA - Generates a (d)efault (p)assword (l)ist as input for THC hydra.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install hydra
Install with: sudo apt install hydra
